description: PostgreSQL MCP wrapper with .env credential mapping, tool selection, and safe read-only defaults.
name: io.github.edelciomolina/postgres-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the database host
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the database port
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the database name
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the database user
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_USER

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the database password
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_PASS

environmentVariables.description: Name of the .env variable that holds the SSL mode (e.g. require)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_KEY_SSLMODE

title: Postgres MCP
